prompt: Press the UP arrow to move your object UP!
Can you send it upwards? Tap UP!
feedback: Up it goes! Higher and higher.

prompt: Now press DOWN — send it down!
Down — can you press the down arrow?
LEFT now — move it to the left!
And RIGHT — move it to the right!
feedback: Right! Up, down, left, right — you know all four directions!

prompt: Now drag it with your finger — move it wherever you like!
Can you drag it to a new spot?
feedback: You moved it! You can put things exactly where you want them.
